headline: American Airlines (AAL) Aligns Governance, Equity Plan and Google SAF Deal Is the Strategy Coherent?
summary: In June 2026, American Airlines Group Inc. held its annual shareholder meeting, where investors rejected proposals for written-consent rights and cumulative voting, while the company also filed a US$324.07 million shelf registration for 23,000,000 common shares tied to an employee stock ownership plan. These governance and capital-raising moves come alongside American’s push into sustainable aviation fuel, high-speed in-flight connectivity, and major hub expansions at Dallas/Fort Worth and...

headline: Government welcomes Google Subsea Cable Landing as major investment in Bermuda's digital future
summary: Bermuda welcomed the landing of Google's Nuvem and Sol subsea cable systems in Bermuda, describing the milestone as a significant investment in the island's digital infrastructure, economic resilience, and long-term competitiveness. The ceremony brought together representatives of the Government of Bermuda, the Bermuda Business Development Agency (BDA), Google and other partners connected to the project.

content.title: Government welcomes Google Subsea Cable Landing as major investment in Bermuda's digital future
content.summary: Bermuda welcomed the landing of Google's Nuvem and Sol subsea cable systems in Bermuda, describing the milestone as a significant investment in the island's digital infrastructure, economic resilience, and long-term competitiveness. The ceremony brought together representatives of the Government of Bermuda, the Bermuda Business Development Agency (BDA), Google and other partners connected to the project.

thumbnail.caption: The Nuvem and Sol cable systems will strengthen international connectivity, enhance network resilience, and support the growing demand for secure, reliable digital infrastructure worldwide.

headline: IonQ Faces Scrutiny As Controversy And Funding Snub Test Investor Trust
summary: IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) is facing social media controversy after former pharmaceutical executive Martin Shkreli accused the company of exaggerating its quantum computing capabilities, including claims related to Bitcoin mining. The dispute has fueled questions about IonQ's technology disclosures and has drawn wider attention to how quantum computing potential is described to investors and the public. At the same time, IonQ, along with Google and Microsoft, was not included in a new US government...

headline: Hitachi Deepens Google And Intel Ties To Power Industrial AI Growth
summary: Hitachi (TSE:6501) expanded its alliance with Google Cloud to speed up deployment of physical AI and next generation cybersecurity solutions. The company also announced a new partnership with Intel focused on physical AI, factory automation, quantum computing, and edge AI uses. These moves deepen Hitachi's ties with global technology providers across cloud, semiconductor, and industrial computing. headline: Lucid Group (LCID) Is Down 9.0% After Gravity OTA Upgrade Highlights Innovation Amid Securities Lawsuits

At the same time, Lucid is grappling with a series of securities class action lawsuits alleging that management misrepresented supplier quality problems that disrupted Gravity deliveries and hurt...

headline: NECA Applauds Google.org for Support of the electrical training ALLIANCE and Skilled Trades Growth
summary: The National Electrical Contractor's Association (NECA) is proud to recognize continued funding from Google's philanthropy, Google.org to modernize skilled trades training and expand access to in-demand, high-wage careers across the country. On Thursday, June 11, 2026, Google.org announced a second round of funding for the electrical training ALLIANCE (etA), a training program jointly funded by NECA and the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW).

content.title: NECA Applauds Google.org for Support of the electrical training ALLIANCE and Skilled Trades Growth
content.summary: The National Electrical Contractor's Association (NECA) is proud to recognize continued funding from Google's philanthropy, Google.org to modernize skilled trades training and expand access to in-demand, high-wage careers across the country. On Thursday, June 11, 2026, Google.org announced a second round of funding for the electrical training ALLIANCE (etA), a training program jointly funded by NECA and the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW).

thumbnail.caption: The electrical industry and skilled trades create pathways to successful careers, family-sustaining wages, and long-term opportunity for generations of electrical industry professionals.

headline: Hedge funds sold broader tech ahead of SpaceX IPO, JPMorgan data shows
summary: Hedge funds sold out of the biggest U.S. tech stocks, and some even added ‌bearish positions, according to data from a JPMorgan note late ‌Thursday, just before SpaceX was set to go public on Friday.  Shares in the "Magnificent Seven" -- ​a group that includes some of the biggest tech names on Wall Street, namely Nvidia, Apple, Amazon.com, Alphabet, Meta, Tesla, and Microsoft, have all declined since last Friday.  The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF, which tracks these ‌stocks closely, declined over 2.4% ⁠since June 5, with some analysts saying investors were clearing their decks in order to prepare for the ⁠debut of Elon Musk's Space X on Friday.

content.title: Hedge funds sold broader tech ahead of SpaceX IPO, JPMorgan data shows
content.summary: Hedge funds sold out of the biggest U.S. tech stocks, and some even added ‌bearish positions, according to data from a JPMorgan note late ‌Thursday, just before SpaceX was set to go public on Friday.  Shares in the "Magnificent Seven" -- ​a group that includes some of the biggest tech names on Wall Street, namely Nvidia, Apple, Amazon.com, Alphabet, Meta, Tesla, and Microsoft, have all declined since last Friday.  The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF, which tracks these ‌stocks closely, declined over 2.4% ⁠since June 5, with some analysts saying investors were clearing their decks in order to prepare for the ⁠debut of Elon Musk's Space X on Friday.

thumbnail.caption: View from Starbase as the SpaceX IPO launches
